tool_args: SELECT station_id, name, island FROM mesonet_stations WHERE name ILIKE '%manoa%' OR name ILIKE '%lyon%' OR name ILIKE '%waolani%'
tool_result_summary: 3 stations near Manoa: Lyon Arboretum (0501), Upper Waolani (0503), Waolani (0504). Lyon Arboretum is in Manoa Valley.

tool_args: SELECT var_id, description, units, value, timestamp FROM mesonet_measurements JOIN mesonet_variables WHERE station_id='0501' AND timestamp=MAX(timestamp)
tool_result_summary: 5 variables at 00:45 UTC: Tair 25.59°C, RH 85%, WS 0.157 m/s, RF 0mm, SM 0.594 m³/m³

tool_args: SELECT SUM(value) AS rain_24h_mm FROM mesonet_measurements WHERE station_id='0501' AND var_id='RF_1_Tot300s' AND timestamp >= now()-24h
